name: datacenter-ops-env
description: Genuine multi-agent RL environment for data center operations. Three agents (Watcher, Responder, Coordinator) take turns in fixed round-robin. Tight episode budgets and strict sequential gating ensure random agents score ~0.02-0.40 while trained agents score ~0.85+.
author: OpenEnv Hackathon 2026

tasks.name: Single Incident Response
tasks.description: One incident. 24 steps total (8 per agent). Must execute alert→investigate→diagnose→request_help→dispatch→[wait]→resolve in correct order.

tasks.name: Concurrent Incident Management
tasks.description: Up to 3 simultaneous incidents. 42 steps. 20% cascade probability. Agents must coordinate across multiple incidents.

tasks.name: Cascade Failure Prevention
tasks.description: Up to 5 critical incidents. 60 steps. 35% cascade risk. Only 3 technicians. Requires disagreement resolution.
